  • Package

    Serialized Form

    • Package com.example.codebase

      • Class com.example.codebase.Event

        class Event extends Object implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • cancelledEntrants
            ArrayList<String> cancelledEntrants
            Device IDs of entrants who declined their invitation or were removed.
          • description
            String description
            Detailed description of the event.
          • drawDate
            Date drawDate
            Date and time when the lottery draw is performed.
          • endDate
            Date endDate
            Date and time when the event ends.
          • enrolledEntrants
            ArrayList<String> enrolledEntrants
            Device IDs of entrants who accepted their lottery invitation.
          • eventId
            String eventId
            Secondary Firestore document ID field. Kept in sync with Event.id.
            See Also:
            • Event.setEventId(String)
          • geoEnabled
            boolean geoEnabled
            Whether geolocation verification is required when joining the waiting list. When true, the entrant's location is recorded at registration time.
          • id
            String id
            Primary Firestore document ID. Kept in sync with Event.eventId.
            See Also:
            • Event.setId(String)
          • location
            String location
            Physical or descriptive location of the event.
          • maxCapacity
            Long maxCapacity
            Maximum number of entrants who may be enrolled in the event. null indicates no cap.
          • organizerDeviceId
            String organizerDeviceId
            Device ID of the organizer who created this event.
          • poster
            EventPoster poster
            Optional event poster, storing a Base64-encoded image and associated metadata.
          • posterUrl
            String posterUrl
            URL pointing to the remotely hosted poster image (alternative to Event.poster).
          • price
            float price
            Participation fee for the event. 0.0 indicates a free event.
          • registrationDeadline
            Date registrationDeadline
            Deadline after which no new waiting-list registrations are accepted.
          • registrationOpen
            Date registrationOpen
            Date and time from which entrants may join the waiting list.
          • selectedEntrants
            ArrayList<String> selectedEntrants
            Device IDs of entrants chosen by the lottery draw but not yet responded.
          • startDate
            Date startDate
            Date and time when the event begins.
          • status
            String status
            Firestore-persisted status string (e.g. "active", "ended"). UI components derive display status from date fields instead; see OrganizerEventAdapter.
          • title
            String title
            Human-readable event title.
          • waitingList
            ArrayList<String> waitingList
            Device IDs of entrants who have joined the waiting list.
          • waitlistCap
            int waitlistCap
            Maximum number of entrants allowed on the waiting list. 0 indicates no cap.
          • winnersCount
            Long winnersCount
            Number of entrants to select during the lottery draw. null indicates the draw picks all waiting-list entrants.
